column1: "Does Tim sleep well?" she asked. - She asked if Tin _________ well.
"Does he drive a car?" he said. - He wanted to know if he__________a car.
"Do you often get together with your relatives?" she said. - She asked him if he often _______together with his relatives.
"Do you live in the city?" - he said. - He asked me if I__________in the city.
"Do you like animals?" he said. He asked her if she____________animals.
"Does she speak Japanese? she said. - She asked if she ___________Japanese.
"Don't you help her?" she said. - She asked me if I _________her.
"Does she always sit here?" he said. - He asked if she always sat _______
"Do you work here" he asked. He asked if I worked____________
"Does she play computer games?" she said. She asked if she__________computer games.
"Do you like reading books?' she said. She asked if I__________reading books.
"Does he get up early?" he said. - He asked if he___________early.
